series_metadata.series_description: Records document the purchase and payment for goods and/or services. Records include, but are not limited to, backup and supporting documents like requests to purchases (RTPs), information captured in the RTP system, print request orders (PROs), and findings for recovery.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 4 years provided audited. ; Paper: Retain 4 years provided audited unless saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
